calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Linda Colfax, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Ward #11918.

Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness Emanuel Zuniga was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant David Wayne Conant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 180 Turk St. #703, San Francisco, CA 94102.
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover Damages - $299.00
Waived Costs.
Total - $299.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Off Calendar
